positive: Mid-century modern travel poster style artwork depicting a retro hot air balloon floating over a stylized desert landscape with palm trees and distant mountains. Limited color palette (mustard yellow, teal, burnt orange). Flat graphic design, silkscreen print texture, atomic age aesthetic, highly stylized, vector art look.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, gradient wash, watercolor
